Should The U.S. Follow China's Auto Industry Playbook?
Chinese EVs may hit U.S. within a few years, one way or another
Sticker Shock at the Pump Fuels a Surge in Hybrid Sales

US House lawmakers propose $130 annual EV fee to pay for road repairs

holdings.infoBox: LIT is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Rio Tinto Group stock at 20.29%, NAURA Technology Group at 5.91%, TDK Corporation at 5.89%, Panasonic Holdings at 5.49%, and Albemarle at 5.36%.

overview.description: The Global X Lithium & Battery Tech ETF (LIT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global lithium miners and battery producers. LIT was launched on Jul 22, 2010 and is issued by Global X.
